titre: Stellantis — STLA Brain et STLA SmartCockpit

Intelligent Vehicles & Software
Intelligent Vehicles & Software
Stellantis is transforming vehicles into intelligent, connected companions. With AI and advanced software platforms, we deliver personalized control, real-time updates, and new experiences that evolve with you.
At the core of our software strategy are two next-gen platforms:
The digital backbone of our vehicles, STLA Brain connects all electronic systems and enables fast, secure OTA updates. Its service-oriented architecture separates software from hardware, delivering continuous innovation and AI readiness.
Powered by STLA Brain, SmartCockpit connects your vehicle to your digital life. It uses AI and multi-modal interfaces (voice, touch, gesture, glance) to offer navigation, entertainment, and more seamlessly integrate into your drive.
Real-World Tech That Transforms the Drive
Our technology isn’t just innovative, it’s practical. These features are already making a real impact on the road today, transforming how drivers interact with their vehicles and the world around them. From connected services to fleet solutions and intelligent alerts, we’re delivering smart, seamless experiences that enhance safety, productivity, and convenience every time you drive.
Notifies drivers of nearby emergency vehicles through Uconnect. Already in ~2 million vehicles across North America.
Connect Fleet by Free2move
Integrated fleet management tools for real-time tracking, emissions reduction, and optimized usage.
A first-of-its-kind infotainment feature for fleet managers and drivers that enables real-time task management and safer communication.
A built-in app store that turns your vehicle into an entertainment and productivity hub, from streaming to shopping.
Harness data from over 14 million connected vehicles to improve road safety, optimize services, and enable smarter urban planning.
